title: cyclosorus poiteanus
intro: Cyclosorus poiteanus, also known as the Chinese leopards' bane or the Chinese water fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus poiteanus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it can also be dried and powdered for use in capsules or as an ingredient in dietary supplements.
